title: StableMagnet - REKT
relevance_summary: Unverified library exploit leading to rug pull on BSC

prevention.rule: Block any tx that deploys or updates a library with known vulnerabilities.

red_flags: Large token transfers to unknown addresses
monitoring_rules: Monitor for library deployments from known vulnerable addresses
summary: StableMagnet suffered a rug pull due to an unverified library exploit. Attackers deployed a malicious library to drain funds and transfer them to Binance, then switched to Ethereum and exchanged USDT for DAI. Guards should block any tx deploying known vulnerable libraries.
